description: Each timepiece from giordano has an elegant, contemporary look and advanced Japanese movements, seamlessly blended with classic, timeless designs. A watch designed for modern life but remaining true to its heritage. Case diameter: 43 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 Year Stainless steel case with crystal embellishments on the bezel for durability, style and comfort Stainless steel strap with a butterfly clasp Black dial with three chronograph displays Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Branding at the 12 hour mark Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rainWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
